jd_text:
🌍 Economic Development Director (Global Program – 150 Countries)

Immediate Hiring | Remote / International Deployment

We are seeking highly motivated and visionary professionals for the role of Economic Development Director, under a global economic development initiative operating across 150 countries worldwide.
Each country will be assigned:
1 Economic Development Director
1 Deputy Director
📌 Key Responsibilities
The Director will be responsible for:
Coordinating directly with local governments, institutions, and stakeholders
Designing and implementing national economic development strategies
Organizing conferences, forums, and high-level development meetings
Leading and managing economic development projects
Building and supervising working groups and operational teams
Recruiting, managing, and overseeing staff in coordination with HR procedures
Identifying, reviewing, and approving project proposals
Preparing reports, audits, and performance evaluations
Developing membership structures, funding systems, and fundraising initiatives
Assigning tasks to field teams and ensuring project execution
Delivering results and achieving defined performance targets
⏳ Probation Period
3-month probation period applies to all selected candidates
Performance, leadership, and target achievement will be evaluated
Full appointment is confirmed only upon successful completion of probation

💼 Employment Terms
Remote global position (with possible international deployment based on HR coordination)
Salary aligned with European standards
Performance-based commissions and incentives
Additional benefits as per local employment laws
Annual 13th salary for high-performing directors
Year-end awards and recognition programs
⚠️ Recruitment Process
All candidates must follow the official HR recruitment procedure provided by the HR department. Immediate onboarding is planned for selected candidates.
🚀 Apply Now
We are looking for leaders who are ready to drive real economic impact on a global scale.
📩 Interested candidates may apply through official HR channels.
